Refactor: Update redirect and revalidation paths from /decks to /

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
UI: Redesign ReviewButtons with minimal styling

- Remove colored button styles for cleaner look
- Add rounded borders and hover states
- Use consistent typography with app fonts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Code\\HumanBuilds\\axon" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Feature: Add review status banner and per-deck due counts to dashboard

Fetch due cards in parallel with decks query, display a banner between
the header and deck grid showing either cards due with a study CTA or
an "All Caught Up" message. Fix per-deck dueCount \(was hardcoded to 0\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
